final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: professional food photography, commercial editorial
Primary request: macro close-up of a Michelin three-star French dish — slow-cooked duck breast with truffle sauce, precisely plated
Scene/backdrop: dark marble countertop, luxury fine-dining restaurant ambiance
Subject: sliced duck breast arranged neatly, golden-brown crispy skin, pink juicy interior, micro vegetable garden garnish including mini carrots, purple radicchio leaves, edible flowers, fresh black truffle slices on top, artistic truffle sauce brushstroke on white bone china plate edge
Style/medium: professional commercial food photography, photorealistic
Composition/framing: macro close-up, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on duck breast cross-section texture
Lighting/mood: side lighting, dramatic highlights, luxurious and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: rich saturated colors — golden-brown skin, pink meat, deep green microgreens, purple radicchio, white bone china, dark marble background
Materials/textures: crispy caramelized skin, tender juicy meat, glossy truffle sauce, smooth porcelain, rough marble
Constraints: keep the duck breast cross-section as the focal point, maintain high color saturation, professional commercial grade
Avoid: overcooked gray meat, plastic-looking food, flat lighting, cluttered composition, watermark
